species: Using competition studies, proteins, which bind the beads specifically and nonspecifically, were identified in parasite lysate (Trypanosoma brucei and Leishmania major) for each antifolate compound.
cell_type: L. major (Friedlin) promastigotes were grown in M199 media (1) until they reached late log (cell density 4 × 107 cells/mL).
sample_source: T. brucei brucei variant 117 were purified from infected blood over DE52 cellulose as described previously.
cell_line: They were incubated at 4 °C for 1 h with L. major, T. brucei, or HeLa cell extract...
strain: L. major (Friedlin) promastigotes were grown in M199 media...
